ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 Liquid 模板插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 Liquid 模板插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where to find your templates, it will be used also as root folder for the liquid tags, like the include ones
ast.target: 用于查找模板的文件夹，它也将用作 Liquid 标签（如 include 标签）的根文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the folders you want to exclude from the autosuggest menu, relative to the "Templates folder" above. Comma separated values. (useful if you have a "common" or "partial" folder where you store all the partial templates)
ast.target: 您希望从自动建议菜单中排除的文件夹名称，相对于上面的“模板文件夹”。使用逗号分隔值。（如果您有一个存储所有部分模板的“common”或“partial”文件夹，这将非常有用）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Starting with v2.0.0-beta.1 date-fns doesn't accept strings as date arguments. Please use `parseISO` to parse strings. See: https://git.io/fjule
ast.target: 从 v2.0.0-beta.1 开始，date-fns 不再接受字符串作为日期参数。请使用 `parseISO` 来解析字符串。详情请参阅：https://git.io/fjule

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [LiquidJS] `fs.dirname` is required for relativeReference, set relativeReference to `false` to suppress this warning, or provide implementation for `fs.dirname`
ast.target: [LiquidJS] `relativeReference` 需要 `fs.dirname`，请将 `relativeReference` 设置为 `false` 以忽略此警告，或为 `fs.dirname` 提供实现。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Tokenizer#readWord() will be removed, use #readIdentifier instead

ast.name: text
ast.source: NOTE: if you change this setting you need to reload Obsidian in order to take action.
ast.target: 注意：如果您更改此设置，需要重新加载 Obsidian 才能生效。
